series_metadata.series_description: This includes supporting information including Dist or Ready Mix submittal, Quality Assurance Documentation, special mix documentation, worksheets/correspondence, and engineer approval. The SUPPLIER TEST DATA lists the components and/or test results from physical testing performed by the Producer/Supplier or from an Independent Testing Lab on this particular material. The results are reviewed by OMM to confirm compliance or noncompliance to ODOT specifications.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain on shared electronic database (Site Manager) and internal electronic storage drive permanently., Electronic: Permanent
